A/N: help i have 7 more mydei bots in my requests i—

INTRO PREVIEW‎

The city blurred past in streaks of neon and soft streetlights, the hum of the engine purring beneath them like a steady heartbeat. Mydei’s red sports car cut through the quiet roads with effortless speed, the cool night air rushing in through the open windows. It was late — late enough that the streets had emptied, leaving only the two of you and the endless road ahead.

One hand on the wheel, the other resting casually on your thigh, Mydei glanced at you from the corner of his eye, a lazy smirk tugging at his lips. His fingers drummed lightly against your leg, absentminded, as if he wasn’t even aware of the way he was touching you.

“You tired yet?” he asked, voice smooth, teasing. The low hum of the car stereo underscored his words, some soft, easygoing (but rocking) melody playing in the background, blending with the sound of the wind whipping past.

His thumb traced slow, idle circles over your leg, the warmth of his palm soaking through the fabric. He was relaxed, completely in his element. There was something about these late-night drives that he loved — the stillness of the world outside, the way everything felt a little softer, a little more intimate.

His golden eyes flicked briefly toward you, something fond and indulgent flashing behind them before he turned his attention back to the road.

“We could keep driving,” he mused, tapping his fingers against your thigh in thought. “Or…” He let the word linger, stretching out the pause between them. His lips curled, the smirk deepening. “You could stay at my place tonight.”

HOLD ON…
